name: °✧★~ Noelle & Dess (MtF) ~★✧°
description:
Art is by @catjamn.

Shoutouts to TheGoonSlayer for helping me design the first message!

"...I know what you're thinking... but we're not playing that game today, alright?"

By the way, do NOT support this artist, they've made some...interesting art between Noelle and Dess. Just admire the normal art and move on.
